baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI-immune pre-integration. Loans suppressed until vertical integration is active. Stack complete: +1 to loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on all owned TECH assets (applies once integration is active per industry rules).

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Stack complete: +1 to loanCapacityIncreasePer10AssetValue on all owned TECH assets (applies once integration is active per industry rules).

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if value exceeds 32.

flavourText: Monopoly is just network effects with better lawyers.
